title: Header Design Overhaul: Remove Excess Spacing and Border Radius
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the header to be compact and clean, so that more screen space is available for the main content area.
description:
Remove excess CSS classes from the header to create a more compact, professional look.

## CSS Classes to Remove
- `min-height-100` — reduces header height
- `border-radius-lg` and `border-radius-xl` — removes rounded corners
- `mx-4` — removes horizontal margin
- `shadow-none` — cleanup

## card-navigation Update
```css
.card-navigation {
  background-color: #f8f9fa;
  padding-right: 10px;
}
```
This reduces the top screen real estate needed for navigation.
acceptance_criteria: Header no longer has minimum height constraint
Border radius removed from header elements
card-navigation has light gray background with right padding
Header occupies less vertical space than before
ux_changes: Header made significantly more compact by removing height constraints, border radius, margins, and updating card-navigation styling.
implementation_notes: Developer discussed whether the green background should remain on the top bar. Changes were pushed to staging for review.
comment_summary: Developer raised a question about the top bar background color theme consistency. Changes were applied and approved.
